description: This week's Changelog discusses updates on Solana, including the ongoing Grizzly Thon hackathon, the third core Community call, and a unique public debug session for a bug in version 1.14. A proposal for epoch rewards is highlighted, aiming to improve the calculation and distribution process. New commits on cost tracking and the introduction of Rust-based frameworks Oxylana and Kaizen are also covered.
topic_summary: Updates on Solana's ecosystem including Grizzly Thon hackathon [t=9.60], Community call [t=19.20], public debug session [t=44.30], epoch rewards proposal [t=90.17], and new Rust frameworks [t=210.58].
